zh.Frampton On Severn, Gloucestershire, Eng: 英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Welsche於1506年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾蕾托 索德波利時，她的父親Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd32歲，母親Ann Dinely28歲。她於1530年與Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1592年9月在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福享年86歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Welsche于1506年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾蕾托 索德波利时，她的父亲Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd32岁，母亲Ann Dinely28岁。她于1530年与Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1592年9月在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福享年86岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福。

nameMeanings.name: Welsche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ulrich, Eldor, Erwin.
North German: from a vernacular short form of the personal name Wasmod (see Wachsmuth ).

variants.name: Wesch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Heinz, Siegfried.

variants.name: Wachsmuth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hannelore, Ernst, Gerhard, Hans.
German: from the personal name Hwasmot or Wahsmut, meaning ‘sharp mind’.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Welsche was born in 1506, in Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd, was 32 and her mother, Ann Dinely, was 28. She married Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter in 1530, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. She died in September 1592, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Welsche est née en 1506, à Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ann Dinely, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter en 1530, à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1592, à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England: Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Welsche 1506 in Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd 32 und ihre Mutter Ann Dinely 28. Sie hat 1530 in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1592 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter nel 1530, nel Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1592, nel Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Welscheが1506年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアリットル ソドブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rdは32歳，母Ann Dinelyは28歳であった。1530年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンでSir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1592年9月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンで86歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Welsche(이)가 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 리틀 소드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Dinely(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1592년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Welsche nasceu em 1506, em Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ann Dinely, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter em 1530, em Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Welsche родилась в 1506 г. в местности литл содбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Dinely, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter в 1530 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1592 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel Welsche nació en 1506, en Little Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ann Dinely, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter en 1530, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1592, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
